creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2010-01-31 01:49:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/desktop-installer Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                               pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Desktop-installer is a post-install script to assist in setting up a
  FreeBSD desktop system using any of the mainstream desktop systems.
  It automatically installs essential software and configures subsystems
  such as HAL, CUPS, etc. for typical use.
  
  WWW:    http://personalpages.tds.net/~jwbacon/Ports
  
  PR:             ports/143180
  Submitted by:   Jason Bacon <jwbacon at tds.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1160    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/sysutils/desktop-installer/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/desktop-installer/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/sysutils/desktop-installer/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/sysutils/desktop-installer/pkg-plist (new)
